Tools of the trade

The software stack behind every cut, grade, and transition — chosen for speed, quality, and platform fit.

🎬
DaVinci Resolve
Primary editor & colorist

Hollywood-grade color science and a non-linear timeline built for precision. Used for long-form edits and brand promos where quality is non-negotiable.

Color grading Long-form Brand promos Fusion FX
📱
CapCut
Short-form specialist

Purpose-built for vertical, fast-cut content. When speed and platform-native energy matter more than render time — Reels, Shorts, and TikTok are home turf.

TikTok Reels Shorts Trending cuts

How it works

No back-and-forth for weeks. A simple four-step process built around your deadline, not mine.

01

Send your footage + brief

Drop your raw clips and tell me the vibe, platform, and deadline. That's all I need to start.

Day 1
02

First cut within 24h

You get a draft fast. No waiting a week to see something for the first time.

Day 2
03

Revisions until it's right

Up to 2 rounds of changes included. You'll get exactly what you envisioned.

Day 2–3
04

Final delivery

Export in your preferred format and resolution, ready to upload straight away.

Day 3–4
